name: Mohamed Elkory
title: Full Stack Developer
tagline: A passionate Full Stack Developer crafting exceptional digital experiences

story: I'm a passionate Full Stack Developer with a keen eye for design and a commitment to building exceptional digital experiences. My journey began with curiosity for how websites work, and it has evolved into a career dedicated to creating intuitive, performant, and beautiful applications.

I specialize in modern web technologies, with a focus on React, Next.js, and cloud infrastructure. I believe in writing clean, maintainable code and continuously learning new technologies to stay at the forefront of web development.
When I'm not coding, you'll find me exploring new frameworks, contributing to open-source projects, or sharing knowledge with the developer community.

now.learning: Deepening my knowledge of server components and advanced Next.js patterns
now.focus: Building scalable applications and improving system design skills
now.exploring: AI/ML integration in web applications and edge computing
